title: webhook: include labels in dry-run response
body:
Fixes #41.

Problem: dry-run webhook responses omit the labels that would be applied.

Change: return the maintainer labels beside the comment preview.

Risk: low because this changes dry-run JSON only.

Verification: npm test passed locally. Expected labels are present; actual before omitted labels.

issues.title: Dry-run webhook response should include would-apply labels
issues.body: The dry-run JSON response omits labels, so maintainers cannot preview label writes.

pullRequests.title: webhook: expose dry-run label preview
pullRequests.body: Adds label preview output to dry-run webhook responses.

pullRequests.title: webhook: include dry-run labels in response
